description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a matte black finish and a synthetic full stock for stability. The receiver and barrel are constructed from metal, with a prominent pump-action fore-end that has a ribbed texture for improved grip. The magazine is detachable and box-shaped, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The pistol grip is ergonomically shaped, likely made from polymer, and the trigger guard is rounded and slightly elongated for finger protection. Subtle colored accents, such as a red safety indicator and teal highlights, add visual interest to the otherwise utilitarian appearance.
description: A tactical, matte black shotgun with a full synthetic stock, ribbed pump-action fore-end, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile and the ribbed pump fore-end directly beneath the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full stock, pistol grip, box magazine, and ribbed pump-action fore-end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock's width and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same key features as view 1, with additional detail on the safety and magazine release.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbed pump fore-end and standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded and elongated trigger guard with moderate size, providing finger protection
